topStories.description: Amid the ongoing Middle East war, reports suggest that car-selling platforms in the US and Europe are seeing an uptick in inquiries for electric vehicles (EVs). This comes as Iran continues to keep the Strait of Hormuz shut in retaliation for the US-Israel war

dailyNews.title: Good Friday 2026 in the US: Are stock markets, banks, postal services open or closed on April 3?
dailyNews.description: Good Friday on April 3. Here’s what to know about US stock markets, banks, schools, government offices, postal and delivery services, retailers, and restaurants.

dailyNews.title: Who is Kamal Kharazi? Former Iranian Foreign Minister ‘critically injured’ in US-Israeli strike on his home
dailyNews.description: Kamal Kharazi, ex-Iranian foreign minister, sustained serious injuries in a US-Israeli strike that also resulted in his wife's death. Kharazi, a key advisor to Iran's Supreme Leader, was involved in back-channel negotiations with the US, which critics say the attack aimed to sabotage.

dailyNews.title: Macron responds to Trump mocking his marriage: ‘Neither elegant nor up to standard’
dailyNews.description: During the lunch, Trump mimicked a French accent while commenting on Macron’s marriage: “I call up France, Macron – whose wife treats him extremely badly. Still recovering from the right to the jaw.”

dailyNews.title: UK refuses to get dragged into US-Iran war, but is leading international effort to reopen Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer has resisted involvement in the US-Israeli strikes against Iran, focusing instead on reopening the Strait of Hormuz. The UK is convening a coalition of nations to discuss restoring navigation in the strategic waterway amid rising global oil prices.

dailyNews.title: Trump Vows to Hit Iran 'Extremely Hard' in Coming Weeks
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump delivered a prime-time address to the nation on Wednesday, declaring military success against Iran and making his case for what he says will be several more weeks of war. "We're going to hit them extremely hard over the next two to three weeks. We're going to bring them back to the Stone Ages where they belong," he says. Iran has responded saying, the U.S. hasn’t destroyed key targets and that it won’t open the Strait of Hormuz. NBC’s Gabe Gutierrez reports and Meet

dailyNews.title: Oil soars past $113, stocks sell off after Trump's Iran war address contains no off-ramp
dailyNews.description: Stocks dropped sharply and oil prices surged after Donald Trump's address about the Iran war failed to assure markets that the conflict would end soon.

dailyNews.title: Despite Trump's claims, there's no indication Iran's regime has lost power, Western officials and experts say
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump said in his address to the nation on Wednesday night that regime change has occurred in Iran because all of the country's original leaders are dead

dailyNews.title: Trump's Iran threats alarm war crimes experts
dailyNews.description: Donald Trump risks turning America into a "rogue state," a former U.S. ambassador for war crimes issues warned after the president threatened to bomb power stations and desalination plants in Iran.

dailyNews.title: Oil prices rise after Trump insists the Iran war is going to plan
dailyNews.description: One market analyst says Trump warning the Iran war will take 2-3 more weeks, without a plan to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, "was far less than" investors had hoped for.

dailyNews.title: Gov. Whitmer seeks federal disaster declaration after deadly March 6 tornadoes
dailyNews.description: Gov. Gretchen Whitmer requested a major disaster declaration from President Donald Trump after tornadoes in Branch, Cass and St. Joseph counties killed four people and destroyed homes and businesses.

dailyNews.title: Dow falls more than 600 points after Trump vows to continue Iran strikes
dailyNews.description: Stocks are sliding after investors were left unsettled by President Trump's Wednesday night speech.

dailyNews.title: Can Trump really pull the U.S. out of NATO?
dailyNews.description: President Trump continues to slam the members of the North Atlantic Treaty Organization for their lack of support in the Strait of Hormuz as the Iran war rages on. Jack Detsch, a defense reporter at POLITICO, joins CBS News with more insight.
